//: Typechecks src + test together. The emitting project (tsconfig.json) excludes test/ so tests never land in dist/, which would otherwise leave them typechecked by nothing — they were covered by app/tsconfig.seams.json before the move. Two inherited settings have to be restated: `exclude` filters `include` rather than being overridden by it, and `rootDir` is widened to the package root so test/ is allowed in the program (harmless, since this project emits nothing).
